name: FireEye Central Management
description: This app provides investigative actions for FireEye Central Management

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app

parameters.name: container_id
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app

parameters.name: container_count
parameters.description: Maximum containers to create

parameters.name: artifact_count
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Start Time

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End Time

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: From

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: Subject

parameters.name: appliance_id
parameters.description: Appliance ID

parameters.name: queue_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of Queue IDs of the quarantined emails to be released

parameters.name: sensor_name
parameters.description: The sensor display name

actions.name: Get Quarantined Email
actions.description: Save an individual quarantined email to vault

parameters.name: queue_id
parameters.description: Queue ID of the quarantined email

parameters.name: sensor_name
parameters.description: The sensor display name

actions.name: Get Alert
actions.description: Retrive details about an individual alert

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID / UUID of the alert to retrieve

actions.name: List Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve alerts based on provided filters

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Specifies the start time of the search. This filter is used with the duration filter and cannot be specified with an end_time filter at the same time

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Specifies the end time of the search. This filter is used with the duration filter and cannot be specified with an start_time filter at the same time

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Specifies the time interval to search

parameters.name: info_level
parameters.description: Specifies the level of information to be returned

parameters.name: callback_domain
parameters.description: Filter for alerts that include callbacks to the specified domain

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: Filter for alerts with a malware file with a given name

parameters.name: malware_name
parameters.description: Filter for alerts with a malware with a given name

parameters.name: malware_type
parameters.description: Filter for alerts with a malware with a given type

parameters.name: md5
parameters.description: Filter for alerts with a given md5 hash

parameters.name: recipient_email
parameters.description: Filter for alerts with a given recipient email

parameters.name: sender_email
parameters.description: Filter for alerts with a given sender email

parameters.name: src_ip
parameters.description: Filter for alerts with a given source ip

parameters.name: dst_ip
parameters.description: Filter for alerts with a given destination ip

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Filter for alerts with a given url
